title: braya scharnhorstii
intro: Braya scharnhorstii, also known as Scharnhorst's braya, is a rare and endangered perennial plant species in the family Brassicaceae, native to Alaska and the Yukon. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Braya scharnhorstii include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Braya scharnhorstii can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
